title: Paramochloa crispifolia
taxonomy: Paramochloa crispifolia is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Poeae and the genus Paramochloa. The tribe Poeae is further divided into several subtribes and the genus Paramochloa is part of the subtribe Airinae. This classification is based on the plant's morphology and molecular characteristics. Further research may be necessary to determine the exact classification within the family Poaceae.

The health benefits of Paramochloa crispifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
